steps.description: The student detaches the lens from the DSLR.
The student attaches the lens to the DSLR.
The student withdraws the lens cover.
The student attaches the lens cover.
The student turns on the DSLR.
The student turns off the DSLR.
The student exchanges the battery from the DSLR.
The student exchanges the SD card from the DSLR.
